message.content:
# Mobile App Screenshot Analysis: Movie Details Page (Cast List View)

## 1. Overall Layout Structure
The layout follows a vertical scrollable structure with a header section, content area, and bottom navigation. The page is divided into distinct sections with clear visual hierarchy, using a dark theme with contrasting elements. The content area occupies approximately 90% of the screen height, with the header taking up the top 10%.

## 2. Status Bar
- **Time**: 9:01 (white text, top-left)
- **Battery**: 89% (white icon, top-right)
- **Signal indicators**: Multiple bars showing strong 4G/LTE connection (white)
- **Additional icons**: Wi-Fi, data usage, and notification icons (white)
- **Background**: White (#FFFFFF)

## 3. Navigation/Header Bar Elements
- **URL bar**: Contains "ysflix.com/movie/shoguns" text (light gray #CCCCCC) with a loading spinner icon
- **Navigation icons**: 
  - Back arrow (black)
  - Plus sign (black)
  - Bookmark icon (black)
  - Three-dot menu (black)
- **Background**: White (#FFFFFF)
- **Height**: Approximately 56px with standard Android status bar padding

## 4. Movie Poster
Not visible in this specific view as the page is showing the "Cast List" tab instead of the main movie details. The poster would typically appear in the synopsis view above the tab navigation.

## 5. Movie Title
Not visible in this view as we're in the cast list section. The title would normally appear prominently in the synopsis view with:
- **Font**: Bold, sans-serif (likely Roboto or similar)
- **Size**: 24-28pt
- **Color**: White (#FFFFFF)
- **Position**: Below the poster, centered or left-aligned

## 6. Rating Display
Not visible in this view. In the synopsis view, ratings would typically be displayed with:
- **Stars**: Yellow (#FFD700) filled stars
- **Numbers**: White text with possible color coding (e.g., green for high ratings)
- **Position**: Below the title

## 7. Genre Tags
Not visible in this view. In the synopsis view, genre tags would typically appear with:
- **Style**: Rounded rectangular pills
- **Color**: Dark blue or gray background (#1E3A5F or #333333) with white text
- **Shape**: Rounded corners (8-12px)
- **Spacing**: Horizontal spacing of 8-12px between tags

## 8. Metadata Section
Not visible in this view. In the synopsis view, metadata would typically include:
- **Layout**: Horizontal or vertical list with icons
- **Icons**: Small white icons (16x16px) for year, duration, quality, director
- **Text styling**: Light gray (#AAAAAA) for labels, white (#FFFFFF) for values
- **Elements**: Year (e.g., "2024"), Duration (e.g., "2h 15m"), Quality (e.g., "HD"), Director name

## 9. Download Section
Not visible in this view. In the synopsis view, download options would typically include:
- **Buttons**: Rectangular with rounded corners (8px)
- **Colors**: Green (#4CAF50) for primary download, blue (#2196F3) for secondary
- **Text**: White (#FFFFFF) with file sizes (e.g., "1.2 GB", "720p")
- **Quality options**: Multiple buttons for different resolutions

## 10. Video Player / Trailer Area
Not visible in this view. In the synopsis view, the trailer player would typically be:
- **Position**: Below the metadata section
- **Size**: Full width, height approximately 200-250px
- **Controls**: Standard video player controls (play, progress bar, volume)
- **Background**: Black or dark gray

## 11. Color Scheme
- **Primary background**: Dark blue/navy (#1E3A5F)
- **Secondary background**: Slightly lighter blue (#254B7A) for cards/sections
- **Text colors**: 
  - White (#FFFFFF) for primary text
  - Light gray (#AAAAAA) for secondary text
  - Green (#4CAF50) for active elements (Cast List tab)
- **Accent colors**: Green for active states, blue for links

## 12. Card/Section Backgrounds, Borders, Shadows
- **Cast list section**: Dark blue background (#1E3A5F) with subtle shadow
- **Cast member cards**: Lighter blue background (#254B7A) with rounded corners (8px)
- **Tab navigation**: Green (#4CAF50) for active tab, dark blue (#1E3A5F) for inactive
- **Shadows**: Subtle elevation shadows (1-2px) for depth

## 13. Icons, Dividers, Spacing
- **Cast photos**: Square images (80x80px) with rounded corners (4px)
- **Spacing**: 
  - 16px padding around the entire content area
  - 12px vertical spacing between cast members
  - 8px horizontal spacing between cast photos
- **Dividers**: Subtle 1px light gray (#333333) lines between sections
- **Icons**: Standard material design icons (24x24px) for navigation

## 14. Bottom Navigation or Action Buttons
- **Standard Android navigation bar** at the bottom:
  - Back arrow (left)
  - Home button (center)
  - Recent apps (right)
- **Background**: Black (#000000)
- **Icons**: White (#FFFFFF)

## 15. Scroll Indicators or Other UI Elements
- **Tab navigation**: Two tabs - "Synopsis" (inactive, white text) and "Cast List" (active, green background with white text)
- **Cast list title**: "Cast List" in white, bold text (18pt)
- **Scrollable content**: Vertical scrollable cast grid (3 columns)
- **Load more indicators**: Not visible in this view, but would typically appear at bottom of list

## Additional Details
- **Cast member names**: White text (14pt), centered below photos
- **Image loading states**: Placeholder images with loading spinners for some cast members
- **Responsive design**: The layout adapts to different screen sizes with flexible spacing
- **Typography**: Consistent font family throughout (likely Roboto or similar sans-serif)
- **Accessibility**: High contrast between text and background for readability

This detailed analysis covers all visible elements and their properties, providing sufficient information to recreate the design with precision.
